questions.question: I believe that my daily activities are meaningful and contribute to a greater good.
I am committed to goals or causes that spark my passion and inspire action.
My actions and choices consistently reflect what's really important to me.
The places where I live, work, and spend time support me in living according to my most important values.
I frequently engage in experiences that challenge me and help me grow personally and professionally.
I am aware of my personal strengths and actively seek opportunities to apply them in various aspects of my life.
I frequently express gratitude and show appreciation to others for their support, kindness, or positive impact on my life.
I regularly take a moment to acknowledge and appreciate my personal achievements, strengths, or growth.
I engage in creative activities in the community where I live.
I actively pursue personal interests and passions that inspire my creativity.
I engage in playful & fun activities in the community where I live.
In the community where I live, I can easily meet friendly people and join in unplanned activities anytime.
I make an effort to surround myself with people and activities that boost my enthusiasm and energy.
I maintain a positive attitude even in challenging situations.
When I bump into something amazing, I take the time to truly appreciate and think about its meaning.
My home and the community where I live have places that spark wonder, amazement, and admiration.
My home and the community where I live are safe and secure.
I feel financially safe.
I am able to personalize my living spaces to reflect my needs, tastes and preferences.
I am able to express my talents, character and quirks in my social circles.
My home has spaces that can easily adjust to meet the needs of people I live with.
I am open to diverse ideas and enjoy exploring them.
I can choose how to adapt my home space to meet my needs and preferences.
I feel in control of my life choices and decisions.
In my household, everyone shares responsibility for chores.
I engage in volunteer work in my community.
I feel valued, respected, and able to express my thoughts and opinions in my social environment, regardless of my background.
My home and community have designs that make spaces and activities easily accessible for everyone, considering people with disabilities.
I have people in my community who I trust and can rely on for support.
I make an effort to stay connected with people who are important to me.
I welcome people from my social circles to my home for a visit.
I participate in events or activities in the community where I live.
My daily routine includes activities that promote physical movement, fitness, and healthy eating habits.
I regularly schedule and attend medical check-ups to maintain my physical health.
I regularly incorporate calming elements, like decluttering, using relaxing scents, and adding plants, into my living spaces.
I intentionally set healthy boundaries for the use of digital screens.
I prioritize physical comfort in my living spaces by paying attention to factors like natural light, temperature control, and ergonomics.
I make an effort to keep my living spaces clean, organized, and clutter-free.
I actively set aside time to relax, reflect, and recharge.
I actively engage in activities that require my full attention and presence, such as meditation, yoga, or deep breathing.
